3159140.name: Cat City: A story About Dreams
3159140.description:
Welcome to Cat City, where Throy’s story takes place, a dreamless yellow cat whose self-discovery journey you’ll follow throughout the game as he tries to find a dream to pursue!

Cat City: A Story About Dreams is a modern Point N’ Click game with Visual Novel elements. It’s a calm, relaxing and cheerful experience, perfect for those who wish to step away from reality but are not into the popular and extremely frenetic games from nowadays.

Besides the usual Point N’ Click mechanics, you’ll also find:

  • Places to explore

  • Hidden items

  • Minigames throughout your journey

Cat City will soon come out to PC and mobile devices.
3159140.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 法语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
